title: API Layer
body:
## Definition

An **API layer** centralizes HTTP calls — typed clients, error handling, auth headers — separate from UI components.

## Why it exists

Single place for retries, logging, base URL, and [CORS](concept:cors)-related config; components stay thin.

## How it works

`lib/api/client.ts` + feature hooks using [TanStack Query](concept:tanstack-query). Map responses to view models in selectors/mappers.

## In practice

Never fetch directly inside presentational components; colocate query hooks per domain.
bodyLinked:
## Definition

An **[API layer](concept:api-layer)** centralizes HTTP [calls](concept:call-apply-bind) — typed clients, error handling, auth headers — separate from UI components.

## Why it exists

Single place for retries, [logging](concept:observability), base URL, and [CORS](concept:cors)-related config; components stay thin.

## How it works

`lib/api/client.ts` + feature hooks using [TanStack Query](concept:tanstack-query). [Map](concept:array-map-filter-reduce) responses to view models in selectors/mappers.

## In practice

Never [fetch](concept:fetch) directly inside presentational components; colocate query hooks per domain.
